title: Lazy Sunday Protein Lasagne
description: A chewy, fermented French-inspired lasagne dish featuring high-protein-friendly bhuna sauce, perfect for a lazy Sunday brunch.

ingredients.name: fermented vegetables (e.g. kimchi, sauerkraut)
ingredients.notes: ensure they are fermented and not raw or spoiled

ingredients.name: protein crumbles (e.g. tofu, tempeh, legumes)
ingredients.notes: ensure safe handling of protein sources if needed to avoid cross-contamination

instructions: Prepare the bhuna sauce by heating olive oil in a pan and frying minced garlic until golden, then adding diced tomatoes, onions, and spices like cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Cook for about 10 minutes.
Rinse fermented vegetables well to remove excess salt and rinse off any visible brine, if necessary. Chop finely and mix into the bhuna sauce with protein crumbles (if using).
In a baking dish, place lasagne sheets one by one, layering with the bhuna sauce mixture in between each sheet. If using cheese, sprinkle it evenly on top of the last layer.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown and the cheese is bubbly and melted. Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot with a side salad or fresh fruit to complete your meal.
